basic_details.job_title: ESIC Faridabad Senior Resident Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for 86 Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Employees' State Insurance Corporation (ESIC) Medical College & Hospital, Faridabad, NIT-3
basic_details.short_information: The table below summarises the key details of the ESIC Faridabad Senior Resident Recruitment 2026 for quick reference.

important_dates.raw: Candidates should note there is no separate online application window. Eligibility for age, qualification, and other criteria will be assessed as on the date of the walk-in interview itself.

application_fee.details: The application fee, once paid, is non-refundable under any circumstances.

age_limit.details: The maximum age limit for ESIC Faridabad Senior Resident Recruitment 2026 is 45 years as on the date of the walk-in interview, that is, 15 July 2026. Age relaxation for reserved categories will be applicable as per Government of India guidelines issued from time to time.

qualification.details: Candidates must hold the educational qualification prescribed in accordance with the latest guidelines of the National Medical Commission (NMC), formerly the Medical Council of India (MCI), for the concerned speciality. This generally means an MBBS degree along with a postgraduate degree or diploma (MD/MS/DNB or equivalent) in the relevant department, though the ICU relaxation described above may apply where postgraduate candidates are unavailable. | The maximum age limit for ESIC Faridabad Senior Resident Recruitment 2026 is 45 years as on the date of the walk-in interview, that is, 15 July 2026. Age relaxation for reserved categories will be applicable as per Government of India guidelines issued from time to time. | All candidates must possess an updated Medical Registration with the National Medical Commission (NMC) or the concerned State Medical Council covering all post-MBBS qualifications (MD/MS). Candidates without an updated registration must submit proof of having applied for it; failure to meet this requirement can result in the candidate not being interviewed or their result being withheld.

salary_details.senior resident: Rs. 1,48,669 per month (as on the date of advertisement)
salary_details.non-pg resident: Rs. 1,23,196 per month (as on the date of advertisement)
salary_details.details: The consolidated remuneration for ESIC Faridabad Senior Resident Recruitment 2026 is as follows. | Eligibility for these consolidated pay amounts will be determined as per ESIC Headquarters Office Memorandum No. Z-11012/51/2022-MED-VI dated 08.12.2022, or any subsequent orders issued by the Headquarters Office.

selection_process: Selection for ESIC Faridabad Senior Resident Recruitment 2026 will be made on the basis of the candidate's acquired academic credentials and their performance in the interview
which will be conducted by a duly constituted selection board. There is no written examination. Key points to remember:

Only candidates whose documents are successfully verified by the Document Verification Committee will be allowed to appear before the Interview Board. The result will be published only in the Recruitment section of the official website
www.esic.gov.in. The Offer of Appointment will be sent through email only. Selected candidates must join as per the instructions mentioned in the Offer of Appointment.
how_to_apply: There is no online application process for this recruitment. Candidates must follow the offline, walk-in procedure described below:
Download and fill the offline application form attached with the recruitment advertisement.
Prepare self-attested photocopies of all the documents listed in the required documents section above.
Report to the Examination Hall, Academic Block, ESIC Medical College & Hospital, Faridabad, between 9:00 AM and 10:00 AM on 15 July 2026.
Appear before the Document Verification Committee with the original documents and self-attested copies.
Once documents are verified, appear before the Interview Board on the same day.
Candidates applying for more than one post must submit a separate application, along with the required documents and applicable fee, for each post.

Candidates working in Government, Autonomous, or Statutory institutions should preferably carry a No Objection Certificate (NOC) from their employer at the time of the interview. If the NOC is not immediately available, a copy of the "applied for NOC" along with an undertaking must be submitted at the time of document verification.

content_sections.heading: ESIC Faridabad Senior Resident Recruitment 2026: Overview
content_sections.text: The table below summarises the key details of the ESIC Faridabad Senior Resident Recruitment 2026 for quick reference.

rows.details: Employees' State Insurance Corporation (ESIC) Medical College & Hospital, Faridabad, NIT-3
Examination Hall, Academic Block, ESIC Medical College & Hospital, Faridabad

content_sections.heading: Important Dates
content_sections.text: Candidates should note there is no separate online application window. Eligibility for age, qualification, and other criteria will be assessed as on the date of the walk-in interview itself.

content_sections.heading: Vacancy Details: ESIC Faridabad Senior Resident Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: A total of 86 vacancies (provisional) have been announced for Senior Resident posts across 18 Broad Speciality Departments. The vacancy count may increase or decrease based on actual patient care requirements. The category-wise break-up is given below. Note: In the ICU department, if candidates with a postgraduate qualification do not appear, MBBS doctors without a PG degree but with two years of experience (including at least one year in ICU, General Medicine, Emergency Medicine, Casualty, or Anesthesia from a government or private hospital, not a private clinic) may be considered for appointment as a Non-PG Resident against the Senior Resident post for one year.

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria for ESIC Faridabad Senior Resident Recruitment
content_sections.text: Candidates must hold the educational qualification prescribed in accordance with the latest guidelines of the National Medical Commission (NMC), formerly the Medical Council of India (MCI), for the concerned speciality. This generally means an MBBS degree along with a postgraduate degree or diploma (MD/MS/DNB or equivalent) in the relevant department, though the ICU relaxation described above may apply where postgraduate candidates are unavailable. The maximum age limit for ESIC Faridabad Senior Resident Recruitment 2026 is 45 years as on the date of the walk-in interview, that is, 15 July 2026. Age relaxation for reserved categories will be applicable as per Government of India guidelines issued from time to time. All candidates must possess an updated Medical Registration with the National Medical Commission (NMC) or the concerned State Medical Council covering all post-MBBS qualifications (MD/MS). Candidates without an updated registration must submit proof of having applied for it; failure to meet this requirement can result in the candidate not being interviewed or their result being withheld.

content_sections.heading: Salary and Pay Scale
content_sections.text: The consolidated remuneration for ESIC Faridabad Senior Resident Recruitment 2026 is as follows. Eligibility for these consolidated pay amounts will be determined as per ESIC Headquarters Office Memorandum No. Z-11012/51/2022-MED-VI dated 08.12.2022, or any subsequent orders issued by the Headquarters Office.

rows.consolidated_remuneration: Rs. 1,48,669 per month (as on the date of advertisement)
Rs. 1,23,196 per month (as on the date of advertisement)

content_sections.heading: Application Fee
content_sections.text: The application fee, once paid, is non-refundable under any circumstances.

rows.mode_of_payment: Through Demand Draft in favor of "ESI Fund A/c No.-1" payable at Faridabad

content_sections.heading: Selection Process
content_sections.text: Selection for ESIC Faridabad Senior Resident Recruitment 2026 will be made on the basis of the candidate's acquired academic credentials and their performance in the interview, which will be conducted by a duly constituted selection board. There is no written examination. Key points to remember: Only candidates whose documents are successfully verified by the Document Verification Committee will be allowed to appear before the Interview Board. The result will be published only in the Recruitment section of the official website, www.esic.gov.in. The Offer of Appointment will be sent through email only. Selected candidates must join as per the instructions mentioned in the Offer of Appointment.

content_sections.heading: Required Documents for Document Verification
content_sections.text: Candidates must appear before the Document Verification Committee on the interview date before being permitted to attend the interview, carrying the offline application form along with self-attested copies of the following documents: Certificate of passing Class 10th, for proof of date of birth All mark sheets, attempt certificates, and degree certificate of MBBS All mark sheets, attempt certificates, and degree certificate of MD/MS/DNB or other postgraduate examination Valid EWS/OBC-NCL/SC/ST/PwD certificate issued in the format applicable for appointment to a Central Government job, wherever applicable State or NMC Medical Registration Certificate (updated) Experience Certificate Recent passport-size photograph of the candidate Relieving or No Objection Certificate (NOC) from the previous or current employer, if applicable Aadhaar Card All the above documents will be verified against the original certificates. If any applicable document is not verified by the Document Verification Committee, the candidate will not be allowed to appear for the interview.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for ESIC Faridabad Senior Resident Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: There is no online application process for this recruitment. Candidates must follow the offline, walk-in procedure described below: Candidates working in Government, Autonomous, or Statutory institutions should preferably carry a No Objection Certificate (NOC) from their employer at the time of the interview. If the NOC is not immediately available, a copy of the "applied for NOC" along with an undertaking must be submitted at the time of document verification.

faq.question: Q1. When is the ESIC Faridabad Senior Resident walk-in interview 2026?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for ESIC Faridabad Senior Resident Recruitment 2026 is scheduled for 15 July 2026, with reporting time between 9:00 AM and 10:00 AM at the Examination Hall, Academic Block, ESIC Medical College & Hospital, Faridabad.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are there in ESIC Faridabad Senior Resident Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: A total of 86 vacancies (provisional) have been announced across 18 Broad Speciality Departments, including ICU, NICU, PICU, Anesthesia, and Medicine.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for ESIC Faridabad Senior Resident Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit is 45 years as on the date of the walk-in interview, that is, 15 July 2026, with relaxation for reserved categories as per Government of India norms.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary of a Senior Resident at ESIC Faridabad?
faq.answer: The consolidated remuneration is Rs. 1,48,669 per month for Senior Resident and Rs. 1,23,196 per month for Non-PG Resident, as on the date of advertisement.

faq.question: Q5. Is there an online application for ESIC Faridabad Senior Resident posts?
faq.answer: No. This is a walk-in recruitment. Candidates must bring a completed offline application form along with self-attested copies of the required documents at the time of document verification on the interview date.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for ESIC Faridabad Senior Resident Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application fee is Nil for SC/ST/ESIC regular employees, female candidates, and PH candidates, and Rs. 500 for all other categories, payable through Demand Draft in favor of "ESI Fund A/c No.-1" at Faridabad.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for ESIC Senior Resident recruitment?
faq.answer: Selection is based on the candidate's academic credentials and performance in the interview conducted by a duly constituted selection board; there is no written test.

faq.question: When is the ESIC Faridabad Senior Resident walk-in interview 2026?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for ESIC Faridabad Senior Resident Recruitment 2026 is scheduled for 15 July 2026, with reporting time between 9:00 AM and 10:00 AM at the Examination Hall, Academic Block, ESIC Medical College & Hospital, Faridabad.
